calendar.matters:
Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Aug-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Frank Lee 415-697-4391 tigerpod21@gmail.com Defendant in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The court did not receive a notice to contest. Mr. Lee did not comply with the tentative ruling rule. The Court informs Mr. Lee of the ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FRANK LEE's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

Defendant Frank Lee's motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is off calendar. No proof of service filed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
